name: io.github.freema/vellum
title: vellum
description: Lightweight self-hosted MCP server over a folder of markdown files. One Go binary, embedded web UI, no database.

environmentVariables.name: VELLUM_VAULT_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Directory with the markdown vault (mount a volume here)

environmentVariables.name: AUTH_ENABLED
environmentVariables.description: Enable OAuth 2.1 (single client secret). Required for public deployments.

environmentVariables.name: VELLUM_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Access key for the OAuth flow (openssl rand -hex 32)

environmentVariables.name: VELLUM_ISSUER_URL
environmentVariables.description: Public HTTPS URL when behind a reverse proxy
